generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following the strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm really glad to see more people recognizing how important it is for our national security. As a mom and a teacher, I want to make sure our country can protect itself without always relying on others. The recent reports about improved domestic defense production show we're moving in the right direction. It's our duty to support policies that keep us safe while maintaining our values. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
